descriptionPlaceholder: A short description of this chapter…
hideByDefault: hide members from main timeline by default
membersEmpty: set a date range above to see milestones
membersNoMilestones: no milestones in this date range
deleteConfirmMsg: milestones in this chapter will not be deleted — they will simply no longer be part of this chapter.
errorStartDayRange: start day must be between 1 and {{max}} for the selected month
errorEndRequired: end date is required, or mark this chapter as ongoing
errorEndDayRange: end day must be between 1 and {{max}} for the selected month
errorEndAfterStart: end date must be after start date
endpointTooltip: endpoint — always shown on main timeline
endpointDimTooltip: matches chapter boundary — add to make it an endpoint
